must_detect.matched_text: Structure: Share acquisition with an option to implement a subsequent share exchange (kabushiki kokan); no tender offer (TOB) is currently planned, and any TOB trigger will be assessed pursuant to FIEA requirements

MNPI Covenant: Parties represent reliance solely on publicly announced facts (including previously disclosed FY results and press releases) and shall refrain from trading in breach of FIEA Articles addressing insider trading and tender-offer facts

Policy Framework: Parties will align with Internal Ethics Policy 12-B and the Inclusive Workplaces Charter; generic wellness programs (Wellness Mileage Program) may be extended post-closing without collecting sensitive data

CSR/Community (non-binding): The combined group may sponsor the Rainbow Tigers amateur league and green factory initiatives in Hoshikawa; such CSR statements are aspirational and not conditions to closing
